_comment: G5 — 15 hand-verified lineup entries. Seeded into STATIC collection on `valocoach ingest --seed`. Each entry has the full §8.2 metadata schema plus a `text` description field.

lineups.text: From A Main, stand in the left corner facing A site. Aim at the top of the arch opening, bounce once off the right wall above the double-box. Lands behind default box revealing any defender playing site or A Heaven.
lineups.title: Sova Ascent A site recon — seed

lineups.text: After planting on A Default, fall back to A Main and aim through the arch at 45 degrees upward with one bounce off the ceiling. Shock Bolt lands on the spike and detonates over the default plant spot, denying a defuse from behind the box.
lineups.title: Sova Ascent A post-plant shock — seed

lineups.text: From B Long, stand at the corner before the doors. Aim at the sky above the site at full charge, one bounce off the wall at the back of B site. Reveals anyone holding B site, B Hookah window position, or the back corner behind the box.
lineups.title: Sova Bind B site recon — seed

lineups.text: Place Poison Cloud at the A Short corner before pushing through Showers. Activate the orb to smoke the CT-side default box angle. Combine with Viper's Snake Bite on the default plant spot to enable a safe execute — the smoke blocks the CT and teleporter angle simultaneously.
lineups.title: Viper Bind A execute smoke — seed

lineups.text: After planting B Default on Ascent, retreat to B Main. Aim over the B entrance wall at the spike's position with maximum charge, landing Snake Bite directly on the default plant. The molly fires immediately and covers the defuse window with fire damage.
lineups.title: Viper Ascent B post-plant molly — seed

lineups.text: From A Long, stand at the corner before the A entrance. Throw FLASH/drive over the wall at a 45-degree angle with a right-click underhand throw. The flash pops inside A site behind the main box, blinding any defender holding site or A Short without flashing your own team.
lineups.title: KAYO Haven A flash — seed

lineups.text: After planting C Default on Haven, fall back to C Long entrance. Aim at the back wall just above the door frame with full power — the Incendiary arcs over and lands on the default plant spot. Fires immediately and covers the defuse from behind the main box.
lineups.title: Brimstone Haven C post-plant molly — seed

lineups.text: From spawn, open the Stim Beacon map and place smokes at three positions: the CT-side A Short corner, A Heaven beam, and the back-right corner of A site. Smokes land simultaneously at round start, enabling a full-blind execute without a smoke controller on site.
lineups.title: Brimstone Ascent A triple smoke execute — seed

lineups.text: From Mid Doors, peek slightly left to expose the wall behind B Garage. Fire Recon Bolt at full charge, no bounce, through the B Garage entrance. Dart sticks to the back wall and reveals anyone in B Garage, B Site mid-box, and the corner behind the site boxes.
lineups.title: Sova Haven B garage recon — seed

lineups.text: After planting A Default on Bind, retreat to A Showers entrance. Fire Hunter's Fury first bolt horizontally across the site at head height — it travels through the boxes and hits anyone attempting a defuse from the right-side corner or the front of the spike.
lineups.title: Sova Bind A ult post-plant — seed

lineups.text: From B Main, stand at the right wall just before the B entrance. Throw Haunt in a high arc over the B entrance wall — it lands inside B site and reveals any defenders holding the site, B CT corner, or B Market side. Costs 200 credits and provides the same intel as a Sova dart.
lineups.title: Fade Ascent B haunt — seed

lineups.text: From A Main, cast Dark Cover and aim through the wall at the orange square marker on the A Site entrance wall. The smoke lands inside A site at the CT elbow position, blocking the main defender angle. Combine with a second smoke at A Heaven door for a clean split execute.
lineups.title: Omen Split A CT smoke — seed

lineups.text: From B Main, stand at the wall just before B entrance. Fire Recon Bolt at full charge, one bounce off the back-site wall. Dart sticks above B Default and reveals defenders playing site, B Heaven box, or the CT-side corner behind the main box cluster.
lineups.title: Sova Split B site recon — seed

lineups.text: Place Toxic Screen at the B Orange entrance and activate it immediately at round start. The wall extends through the B site, cutting off the B Kitchen and B Default angles from CT-side. Push through with the wall active — defenders cannot peek through without taking damage.
lineups.title: Viper Icebox B toxic screen — seed

lineups.text: From A Main, stand at the entrance and throw ZERO/point in a high arc. Knife lands behind the A site box cluster, suppressing any defender playing default or Heaven. Suppressed enemies cannot use abilities for 8 seconds — push A immediately after the suppression activates.
lineups.title: KAYO Ascent A zero knife — seed
